description_long: This object is a rectangular, military-style container with a rugged, olive drab exterior and visible rust patches, giving it a weathered, utilitarian appearance. The surface is marked with yellow stenciled text, indicating ammunition specifications and military codes, which are partially faded. A sturdy, hinged lid with a prominent metal handle runs along the top, and reinforced edges suggest durability. The sides feature a latch mechanism and a flat, boxy profile, while the overall construction appears to be heavy-duty metal. The finish is matte and rough, with signs of wear and corrosion consistent with prolonged outdoor exposure. The object exudes a sense of robust functionality, typical of equipment found in military or industrial urban environments.
description: A weathered, olive drab military container with rust patches, yellow stenciled markings, and a sturdy metal handle on top. Its rugged, boxy form and faded text suggest heavy-duty use and prolonged outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: The front view shows the narrow end of the container with yellow stenciled codes and a visible latch mechanism beneath the lid.
description_view_1: The side view displays the full length of the container, the main yellow ammunition markings, and the central handle on the lid.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a flat, unmarked end with a large, rusted patch and the hinge mechanism for the lid.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the long face, with faded yellow text and more visible rust, mirroring the other side.
attribute_location_context: military storage area or urban garage
attribute_installation_method: placed directly on the ground or stacked with similar containers
attribute_weathering_pattern: Visible rust patches and faded paint indicate prolonged exposure to moisture and handling; edges and corners show signs of abrasion.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Yellow stenciled military codes and ammunition specifications are visible on the sides.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: Typically stacked or grouped with similar containers, but visually isolated in this instance.
